channel.title: Product on The Logbook
channel.description: Recent content in Product on The Logbook

item.title: Financial Data Pipeline & Ingestion Engine
item.description: This project page covers the engineering details of a financial data backend built to ingest raw SEC filings and earnings metrics. The project evolved from a content-focused financial news concept into a heavy infrastructure-building exercise, utilizing AI generation for rapid backend assembly while the overall database design and API sync lagged behind.
